name: Format Activity Summary Table
description: Filter, sort, and prepare a CRE-seq activity results DataFrame for display. Supports substring search on element IDs, filtering by active/inactive status, optional FDR-ascending sort, and column selection. Returns a clean DataFrame ready for tabular display or CSV export.

inputs.name: activity_tsv_path
inputs.description: Path to activity_results.tsv produced by the CRE-seq pipeline. Must contain a log2_ratio column.

inputs.name: search_text
inputs.description: Case-insensitive substring to match against element IDs. Leave empty to return all rows.

inputs.name: activity_filter
inputs.description: One of 'All', 'Active only', or 'Inactive only'. Filters on the active column when present.

inputs.name: sort_by_fdr
inputs.description: If true, sort output rows by FDR ascending (most significant first).

outputs.description: Filtered and sorted DataFrame restricted to display columns: element_id, chrom, start, end, dna_counts, rna_counts, log2_ratio, fdr, pval, active, designed_category, chromatin_state, top_motif.

examples.description: Return all active elements sorted by FDR
Search for a specific genomic region
